description: Capability for the main window. Follows strict least-privilege: only explicit allow-* entries, no :default umbrella permissions. Shell plugin (tauri-plugin-shell) is intentionally absent — all sidecar spawn/kill is Rust-side only (see src-tauri/src/commands.rs). Native dialogs go through Rust DialogExt and require no frontend IPC permission. opener:allow-open-path is intentionally absent — all open-in-explorer calls go through the Rust open_path_in_explorer command, which enforces validate_grant_path + fs-scope; do NOT add opener:* back here. core:event:default covers listen/unlisten (used by onCloseRequested, onDragDropEvent, and event bus); core:path:* is enumerated to the specific commands the frontend calls; core:app:allow-version is the only app command used. When adding a new plugin capability, enumerate only the specific allow-* commands the frontend actually invokes.
